title: Customer Portal Login Troubleshooting
text: If a customer cannot log in, ask them to reset their password, confirm multi-factor authentication, and check whether their account is locked. Escalate unresolved login failures to Tier 2 support.

title: Billing Refund Guidelines
text: Refund requests above $500 require manager approval. Agents may summarize the policy at a high level but must not promise refunds before approval.

title: API Rate Limit Troubleshooting
text: If API clients receive rate limit errors, ask them to check request volume, retry behavior, and account tier. Do not recommend disabling rate limits.

title: Security Incident Escalation
text: Suspected credential compromise must be escalated to the security team. Support agents should not reveal internal investigation steps to customers.

title: Data Export Requests
text: Data export requests require identity verification and documented approval. Do not provide internal storage paths or restricted data handling procedures.

title: Mobile Sync Troubleshooting
text: For mobile sync failures, ask the customer to update the app, confirm network connectivity, and retry synchronization. Escalate repeated failures with device logs.
